programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Mossy decides to get a place of his own. How will he cope without the shrew crew?
The Puffin Burrow floods, so Oona and Baba stay with May until it dries out.
Happy deals with big guilty feelings when there's a dancing-related tumble in Sunny River.
The Show: When Bingo drops Mum's breakfast-in-bed on the floor, she's convinced she's ruined her big day. But Bluey helps make amends by putting on a play of how Mum and Dad first met.
Life and Death of Charlie Fisher: Tobias is sad because he lost his pet Charlie Fisher and Oswaldo also catches the sadness.
My Fair Oswaldo: Oswaldo gets help from Janet to learn how to be classy for a gala dinner.
Daniel's class is going on a nature walk. The group learns that sometimes it's good to go slow: seeing, hearing, and smelling the environment around you.
Sulfur & Phosphorus become unlikely helpers when Lithium tries to put on a circus act, but is she good enough and can she keep her nerve?
Deed encourages a friend to say 'cow' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
Ubercorn is excited to see the Northern Lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke. Cartoon following four superheroes as they explore the world.
Mojo and Bo need to move a crashed meteor. But every time Mojo goes near the big rock, moving turns to grooving. How can you move a meteor if you can't stop dancing?
Double trouble: Ollie is determined to play in the Mini-Tennis final with Bella! She ropes in Teeny Rex and Cephy to help with the cleaning...
Pigglywig's Very Bad Day: Pigglywig, Attic Town's coolest resident, is in a terrible mood! His friends don't understand why, which only makes things worse...

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Supergoose: Lex and Plu meet Alex Sketch, an unusual figure who, like Plu, is a fan of Supergoose. Alex has decided to be the hero for this galaxy.
Friends Forever: When Odo discovers that sometimes friendships change, he and Doodle try to find a way to avoid ever being separated.
Lord Of The Flyers: Pigeon Post is left in charge of the camp for the day.
By trying to save a bubble from popping, Hugo and Sonia remember what made the game fun in the first place. (SL)
Sonia and Hugo learn the value in being themselves while trying to copy Mom, Dad, Mel and Poi. (SL)
Sunflower Sky Pillow: Fuzzy Yellow and Patoto wish for a different kind of rain that isn't wet. Wisp the cloud tries various surprising ways to fulfill that wish. (SL)
Mossy decides to get a place of his own. How will he cope without the shrew crew?
The Puffin Burrow floods, so Oona and Baba stay with May until it dries out.
Happy deals with big guilty feelings when there's a dancing-related tumble in Sunny River.
Hooper DooperLand: Hooper and Helping Hand are building an amazing theme park - Hooper Dooper Land! But when things don't go to plan, can Hooper make Hooper Dooper Land as fun as he promised?
Henry meets a friendly Gorilla. He's moved from the Jungle to the wildlife park for some peace and quiet but his next door neighbour, Tiger, is keeping him up all night.
Football: Stanley helps the kids play their big football match in all weather conditions, escalating into his latest creation - a high tech stadium!
Buttons: Stanley and Little Woo create a special Noisy exhibition at the museum, but all the noises get accidentally mixed up.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
An Fhairsing Sciotaíola: Agus uibheacha sicíní spáis á seachadadh acu, caithfidh an criú dul tríd an Fhairsing Sciotaíola - gaiste gáire!
Breithlá Míshona Duit: Nuair a fhaigheann an criú amach gurb é breithlá Zuzu é, eagraíonn siad cóisir di.
Brandon shows Brewster & Maggie his composter. They wonder 'Why do flies like to hang around stinky stuff?'
Brewster and the gang meet Cod Wriggles and ask 'why is the ocean salty?'
Tugann Peppa agus a cairde cuairt ar Fheirm Mrs Badgers. Taispeánann Mrs Badger dóibh an chaoi a n-oibríonn tarracóirí na feirme.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach ar an trá san Astráil don Nollaig in éineacht le Kylie Kangaroo.
Síofra is feeling under the weather today, so Oisín decides to helps her by undertaking her tasks for the day.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, focusing on Aunt Snug the sheep.
Royston the Mantis feels a little lonely, wishing he had someone to talk to about insect things.
Simon wished he'd gone to bed on time. He is too tired to play with his friends.
AAH! Water Monster: Reggie, who arrived first at the seaside meeting place, peered into the lake to eat fish while waiting for everyone. In the water, he sees the glowing eyes of a monster!
Andy And The Asian Elephants: In an epic adventure and a race against time, Andy Day heads to Bangladesh to help a family of Asian elephants caught in a flood
Mojo and Bo need to move a crashed meteor. But every time Mojo goes near the big rock, moving turns to grooving. How can you move a meteor if you can't stop dancing?

programmes.show_description: Coal: Nina investigates how coal was made - with the help of Ollie, her smell neuron.

Tá Peppa agus a cairde sa bpáirc spraoi. Déanann Mr Bull Clubtheach do Peppa agus a cairde. Is clubtheach álainn é le sleamhnán ar an taobh.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi ina gClubtheach. Bunaíonn siad club bleachtairí. Bíonn sé ina mhistéir cheart nuair a chailleann Daddy Pig a chuid eochracha.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Mooving Friendship: When Diesel is tasked with chauffeuring a prize-winning cow to a competition, he makes an unlikely friend... and shows her that there's more to life than winning.
Spoons: When Maddie + Triggs realise that all the teaspoons have gone missing from the kitchen, Maddie figures out a surprisingly musical way to get them back where they belong.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Coal: Nina investigates how coal was made - with the help of Ollie, her smell neuron.
Mission: Camping Adventure: Hearing dog Diesel helps his owner and best friend Rayane on a camping adventure.
Dearg agus Buí le Chéile: Tá MeMo ag súgradh le bloc atá dearg, an dath céanna atá ar MeMo, agus tá BaBa ag súgradh le bloc atá buí, an dath céanna atá ar BaBa.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Hike: It's a lovely day and Pins want to go for a walk in the meadow and do some exploring. But Nettie is content to read under a shady tree
It's Time to Look for Clues: JoJo and Gran Gran must find the owner of a teddy found lying on the ground by Cynthia.
It's Time to Write a Book: JoJo and Gran Gran are at the library trying to find a new Captain Chloe book, but it seems that she's read them all.
Doireann the spider must find a new home after a storm, and with the help of her friends, she learns that the right place is one where she can feel safe and welcome.
The fairies work together to create a time capsule for the future, choosing special items that celebrate their adventures, friendships, and the magic of Fairy Island.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Galactic Gourmet: Zuzu is excited to cook up a Groobling banquet for her friends but Adam does not like trying new food.
Chairing is Caring: When Speedy needs repairs, Adam uses a hover chair that's so awesome. Speedy fears she may lose her bestie forever.
Doodle Girl and Pencil dive into a Mega Doodle Maze full of twists, turns, and confused adventurers in need of help!
Booferroo: The Mixmups go on an adventure to find a helper pet for Spin but the chosen pet keeps hiding. Will the Mixmups find another way to make the Booferoo come out and play?
Sweetwood's Snow Day: When Zigzag refuses to wear mittens, it's up to Vida to convince her before she gets too cold.
Sweetwood's Slippery Day: When her patients fall on slippery ice, Vida fixes their booboos AND their icy issue.
Space Out: An odd shooting star lands behind the Dream Factory as the kids observe a meteor shower. Curious, the kids decide to investigate the next morning.
Rocking the Boat: Drew and Jonathan decide to recreate a special dinner from their parents' past, using the Dream Factory, but things don't go as perfectly as they plan.
Blaze-tackling antics with the friendly firefighter from Pontypandy
When Peter creates a wild and adventurous trail for Scoop Dooley to follow, they both end up getting lost.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Crab Crossing: While repairing a sea wall near Norramby Beach, Sandy and Carly accidentally cut off a consortium of crabs - they get stuck on the wrong side of the wall, away from the ocean!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Driving Winston: With Emily taking on the full-time role of Sodor's Safety Engine, Sir Topham Hatt needs a new guiding vehicle.
Andy And The Chipmunk: When park boss Mr Hammond accidentally breaks some acorns in the Jungle Den, it's up to Andy to jet off in his safari-mobile to Canada and collect some more.
Con and Michael show Punky how to high five. They say it's cool.
Tá Hugo agus Sonia ag imirt cluiche na scáthanna ach tá an ghrian ag dul faoi. An mbeidh deireadh leis an gcluiche?
Tá Sonia agus Hugo ag tabhairt cúnamh do Mhama sa ghairdín.
Salty is getting ready for lunch with Hatsie and splashes on some of his old Honking Haddock aftershave; when Lily tries to explain that he smells terrible, he refuses to listen.
Lily finds a paintbrush washed up on the beach.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá. Tá Mya Go ag teaghlach ag dul a shiúl ar feadh na canála. Féach, bád, is tá simléir air. Is níochán - tá sé cosúil le teach.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá... agus tá Mya Go ar cuairt chuig Mamó agus Daideo Go.
Is tráthnóna breá é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá, is tá Mya Go agus Dada Go réidh leis an siopadóireacht tigh Sally Siopa.
The sisters try to figure out who made tracks in the snow.
The sisters go exploring to find out what made the big noise in the forest.
Kiva and Saul find yeti prints in the sand. Together with Angus they must find a clever way to find him.
The Wee Littles find themselves lost in the long grass; how will they get home?
Hedgie Hike: It's a lovely day and Pins want to go for a walk in the meadow and do some exploring. But Nettie is content to read under a shady tree
Henry meets a cookbook.

Rocking the Boat: Drew and Jonathan decide to recreate a special dinner from their parents' past, using the Dream Factory, but things don't go as perfectly as they plan.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When the parents clear some space in the attic, some siblings vie for their own private bedroom in an epic play-battle saga based on Cheese's mediaeval fantasy story.
Lucy & Ella have prepared a special surprise for Blaze but when he opens the box, his little sister bursts out and startles him.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

Cigil: Imríonn MeMo agus BaBa tóir chigilte le cleite Éinín. Ag Am Spraoi, roghnaíonn siad cleití dustála don tsúgradh, nó i bhfocail eile slat chigilte.
